caption.full:
Jay-Z claimed Colin Kaepernick signed a non-disparagement clause

Jay-Z rapped a verse at Yankee Stadium suggesting Colin Kaepernick signed a non-disparagement agreement as part of his NFL settlement. Sources with direct knowledge state that Colin Kaepernick did not sign a non-disparagement agreement when he settled his collusion lawsuit against the NFL in 2019.

What’s your take on the accuracy of Jay-Z’s claim and why it matters?

AI-assisted recap by The Screen Report.

youtube.title: Colin Kaepernick: No Non-Disparagement Clause in NFL Deal
youtube.description:
Colin Kaepernick did not sign a non-disparagement agreement as part of his 2019 settlement with the NFL. Jay-Z rapped at Yankee Stadium suggesting Kaepernick took a check with such a clause. Kaepernick has continued to publicly criticize the NFL.
